canonical_answer: A white cursive logo reading 'cutepolish' appears over a dark grey heart shape. A hand rests on a yellow textured fabric surface displaying fingernails with pink and purple vertical stripes. One accent nail features a purple base with pink criss-cross lacing and black eyelets. A metal dotting tool applies a small dark blue dot to a glossy light purple fingernail.
